breakdown.creativeCore: Traditional Clothing Infographic Guide：Generates a highly detailed, museum-quality infographic breaking down the structure, materials, and wearing sequence of traditional garments.
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 知识卡片、科普图、社媒长图、教学材料

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 信息图/图解 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: full-body, layered]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
